description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The figure is depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms extended horizontally to the sides, commonly known as a T-pose. She is wearing a two-piece undergarment set, consisting of a bandeau-style top and briefs, both of which fit snugly to the body. The skin surface is smooth and the musculature and anatomical features are subtly defined, giving a realistic yet stylized appearance. The head is proportionate, with facial features clearly modeled, and the hair is styled close to the scalp. The feet are bare, and the overall build suggests an average adult female physique suitable for urban environments.
description: A realistic adult female figure in a T-pose, wearing a fitted two-piece undergarment set with bare feet and close-cropped hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full frontal outline of the body with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, abdomen, and the side of the legs and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulder blades, and the back of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, abdomen, and the side of the legs and arms.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
